Bash(PYTHONPATH=/Users/lzwjava/projects/lzwjava.github.io python3 -c "
from scripts.translation.translate_validate_utils import check_markdown_table_formatting

# Test case 1: Valid markdown (should not raise exception)
valid_md = ''''''
# Header

Some text here.

## Another Header

More content.
''''''

# Test case 2: Invalid markdown (should raise exception)
invalid_md = ''''''
### Key Characteristics
| Property | Description |
| -------- | ----------- |
| Value1   | Desc1       |
''''''

print(''Testing valid markdown...'')
try:
    check_markdown_table_formatting(valid_md)
    print(''✓ Valid markdown passed'')
except Exception as e:
    print(f''✗ Valid markdown failed: {e}'')

print(''Testing invalid markdown...'')
try:
    check_markdown_table_formatting(invalid_md)
    print(''✗ Invalid markdown should have failed but didnt'')
except Exception as e:
    print(f''✓ Invalid markdown correctly failed: {e}'')
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=/Users/lzwjava/projects/lzwjava.github.io python3 -c "
from scripts.translation.translate_validate_utils import check_markdown_table_formatting

# Test case 1: Header immediately followed by table (should add blank line)
test_md = ''''''### Key Characteristics
| Property | Description |
| -------- | ----------- |
| Value1   | Desc1       |

## Another Section
Some text here.''''''

print(''Original:'')
print(repr(test_md))
print()
print(''Fixed:'')
fixed = check_markdown_table_formatting(test_md)
print(repr(fixed))
print()
print(''Formatted:'')
print(fixed)
")
